Task.title: Task
Task.description: A productivity task generated from brain dump.

estimatedMinutes.description: The estimated time to complete the task in minutes.

priorityScore.description: Urgency and impact score from 1 to 100.

priorityReasoning.description: One sentence reasoning for the priority score.

suggestedTimeSlot.description: Suggested time slot today or this week.

isDone.description: Whether the task is marked completed.

subtasks.description: Actionable subtasks broken down by Gemini.

executedOutput.description: Content or artifacts generated by the AI autonomous agent.

isExecutingAutonomously.description: Loading state flag for autonomous execution.

reminderTime.description: Specific time scheduled for context-aware reminder.

title.description: What the habit is (e.g., Drink 3L water).

lastCompletedDate.description: The date (YYYY-MM-DD) when this habit was last ticked off.

habits/{habitId}.description: A collection of habit tracking documents.
